nodes.label: Assembler Alpha Machine Sprite
nodes.description: Flat pixel-art style robot sprite with dark navy/charcoal body, cyan eye panels, three horizontal cyan display bars on torso, a small circular sensor, square shoulder protrusions, and a gray elliptical shadow base. Represents an assembler machine unit in the game.

nodes.label: Assembler Alpha (Game Entity)
nodes.description: An assembler machine entity in the cyberpunk factory game 'You're Just a Machine'. Likely performs assembly tasks on the factory floor as part of the automated production pipeline.

nodes.label: You're Just a Machine (Game)
nodes.description: A Phaser 3 cyberpunk factory worker game jam project. Player navigates as a factory worker among automated machines.

nodes.label: Robot / Industrial Machine Visual Design
nodes.description: Visual design concept: a friendly-looking blocky humanoid robot representing industrial automation. Features a rectangular head with two small cyan eyes, torso with three horizontal cyan bars (conveyor/display panels), circular sensor node, and squared shoulder panels.

nodes.label: Cyan Display Bars (Visual Element)
nodes.description: Three horizontal cyan-colored bars on the assembler's torso, likely representing a conveyor belt, status display, or assembly interface. Gives the machine a high-tech, cyberpunk aesthetic.

nodes.label: Machine Sprite (Asset Category)
nodes.description: Asset category for machine sprites used in the cyberpunk factory game. Located in assets/machines/sprites/.
